CREATE TABLE test_timezones (event_date DateTime64(3), timezone String);
SELECT event_date, toUTCTimestamp(event_date, timezone) AS utc_time FROM test_timezones;

SELECT t1.event_date, t1.timezone, toUTCTimestamp(t1.event_date, t1.timezone) AS utc_time FROM test_timezones AS t1 WHERE toUTCTimestamp(t1.event_date, t1.timezone) > toDateTime('2023-03-16 12:00:00');
SELECT t1.event_date, (SELECT toUTCTimestamp(t1.event_date, t1.timezone)) AS utc_time FROM test_timezones AS t1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_timezones WHERE toUTCTimestamp(event_date, timezone) BETWEEN toDateTime('2023-03-16 00:00:00') AND toDateTime('2023-03-17 00:00:00');
CREATE TABLE events (event_time DateTime64(5), event_timezone String);
SELECT event_time, event_timezone, toUTCTimestamp(event_time, event_timezone) AS utc_event_time FROM events;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events WHERE toUTCTimestamp(event_time, event_timezone) > toDateTime64('2023-03-16 06:00:00', 5);
